title: galium humifusum subsp. cincinnatum
intro: Galium humifusum subsp. cincinnatum, also known as bedstraw, is a plant species within the Galium genus. It is a low-growing, perennial herb that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of bedstraw are attributed to its ability to aid in digestion, relieve menstrual cramps, and reduce fever. Bedstraw can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a versatile remedy for various health concerns.
